applicabilityConditions: Customer demand and capacity urgency remain observable and infrastructure economics remain supportable.
recommendedAction: Scale infrastructure while constraining operating expense growth and monitoring infrastructure economics.
nonApplicabilityConditions: Demand, capacity urgency, or infrastructure economics no longer supports expansion.
guardrails: Keep operating-expense growth and disciplined profitability explicit while capital capacity scales.
exceptions: Use staged or third-party capacity when it preserves flexibility without weakening service commitments.
reversalSignals: Customer demand weakens, capacity urgency relaxes, or infrastructure economics materially deteriorates.

review.rationale: Reviewed against approved same-axis reflections, source-linked Amy Hood principle evidence, holdout boundaries, explicit guardrails, reversal signals, and five-domain PoC coverage; approved at medium confidence.
